concepts.finding:
By analyz-
ing the log-spectrum of an input image, we extract the spec-
tral residual of an image in spectral domain, and propose a
fast method to construct the corresponding saliency map in
spatial domain.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
Starting
from the principle of natural image statistics, we propose a
front-end method to simulate the behavior of pre-attentive
visual search.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
From the perspective of information theory, effective
coding decompose the image information H(Image) into
two parts:
H(Image) = H(Innovation) + H(Prior Knowledge),
H(Innovation)
denotes
the
novelty
part,
and
H(Prior Knowledge) is the redundant information that
should be suppressed by a coding syste
